summary.description: Budget Summary table with all department totals (Revenues & Expenses overview)
summary.confirmation: PDF pages 10-11 contain comprehensive revenue table with TAX REVENUE, STATE REVENUE, LOCAL RECEIPTS, STABILIZATION TRANSFERS, OTHER TRANSFERS, and FUND BALANCE sections, plus Expenses table with GENERAL GOVERNMENT, CULTURE, HEALTH/SOCIAL, PUBLIC SAFETY, PUBLIC WORKS, EDUCATION categories and totals

education.description: Education section with detailed line items and budget narratives
education.confirmation: PDF page 80 begins with Winchester Public Schools letter and Budget Framework, includes Table 1 (School Committee Adopted Budget Override) with Personnel/Other Expenses/Total Budget detail. PDF page 81 continues with WPS Level Services Budget Table 2 and enrollment chart

benefits.description: Undistributed / Fixed Costs / Benefits & Insurance section
benefits.confirmation: PDF page 86 begins with Energy line-item detail table. PDF pages 87-89 contain Personnel Benefits (Contributory Retirement, Workers Compensation, Unemployment Compensation, Health Insurance, FICA & Medicare Tax) and Miscellaneous (Reserve Fund, General Insurance)

metadata.offset_note: Printed page = PDF page - 3 (printed page 7 corresponds to PDF page 10)
